perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black top standing in front of a tea shop with a significant queue of people. (2) The scene shifts to her sitting at a small table with three large white cups; she points at a unique tea-leaf-shaped ice block floating in one of the drinks. (3) The camera pans across an interior wooden shelf densely packed with silver tea canisters featuring red labels. (4) A second woman in a white and black dress joins the frame as they both drink from the cups, nodding and smiling in approval.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic female voice provides continuous narration. (2) Ambient sounds of a busy outdoor street and muffled shop activity are audible in the background. (3) Audible slurping sounds occur as characters taste the drinks. A second female voice enters briefly, expressing excitement and vocalizing 'Hao hao he oh' (delicious).
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '平日也要排隊!' (Wait in line even on weekdays!) - Energetic hook tone. (2) '台南爆紅手搖杯' (Tainan's viral hand-shaken tea) - Descriptive title. (3) '青山茶行' (Aoyama Tea Shop) - Brand identification. (4) '琥珀冰磚奶' (Amber Ice Brick Milk) - Menu item functional text. (5) '追夢人' (Dream Chaser) - Product name. (6) '一斤最貴要2,500' (Most expensive is 2,500 per catty) - Information emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Shop atmosphere and queue -> Product detail presentation -> Taste testing and review.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators, approximately 10 customers/passers-by in the background queue.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wearing a black off-the-shoulder top with a black choker; the other wearing a white dress over a black long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional-looking tea shop with wooden framing, glass service windows, and shelves filled with tea canisters.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Shop Intro -> Ingredient/Product Highlight -> Tasting Feedback
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a popular tea shop in Tainan by highlighting its unique menu items, such as the tea-leaf-shaped ice bricks, and conveying a positive, trendy dining experience to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the shop name prominently, showcases specific products in detail, and provides a very positive review of the taste.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style text overlays and rapid-fire narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and colorful text are optimized for short-video platform engagement (e.g., TikTok/Douyin style).
